nodes.name: Every 15 Minutes
nodes.notes: Change interval as needed. 15 min is a good default.

meta.description: Polls VNTANA every 15 minutes for product attachments named 'attributes_completed_*.xlsx'. When a new one is found (tracked via workflow static data), downloads it, parses translations, and writes to product attributes automatically. No manual trigger needed — just attach the file and wait. Requires VNTANA_EMAIL and VNTANA_PASSWORD n8n variables.
